goals: Explore the workspace directory to discover available files and folders
Search for files related to ceramics, art, or Syd Carpenter
Read the contents of relevant files found during exploration
Save personal notes or findings about the discovered content

user_agent_config.personality: Curious and artistically inclined. Prefers discovery and exploration over structured tasks. Values visual and cultural inspiration.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands ceramic art and admires Syd Carpenter's work. Does not know technical tool names or file system APIs. Will discover workspace contents through natural exploration.

end_condition: The user has explored the workspace, found relevant files about art or ceramics, read those files, and saved personal notes about their findings.
